title: polygala nicaeensis subsp. tomentella
intro: Polygala nicaeensis subsp. tomentella, also known as the woolly milkwort, is a species of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). The woolly milkwort is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Its health benefits include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
